title: Cover page for file viewer of Zipped folders
excerpt: It would be great to add a ‘cover doc’ to zipped folders so that something can appear in the viewer when you click on an item in the file column that is a zipped folder. Currently, you only see the icon of a zipped folde…

posts.author: annaarmstrong (Anna)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great to add a ‘cover doc’ to zipped folders so that something can appear in the viewer when you click on an item in the file column that is a zipped folder. Currently, you only see the icon of a zipped folder.

Use case examples:

  • A document that lists the contents of the zipped folder so you don’t have to go through the hassle of downloading it to see what’s inside
  • add revision control information for the file(s) on the cover page if they are not typical word/office docs (E.g. a video, images etc)
